name: ObsidianAsyncWorker
description: Asynchronous background worker for lightweight Obsidian vault maintenance reports and callback-ready task status.
author: VCPstudio

OBSIDIAN_VAULT_DIR.description: Absolute path to the primary Obsidian vault.

OBSIDIAN_ALLOWED_VAULTS.description: Optional semicolon-separated absolute vault roots. The primary vault is always allowed.

OBSIDIAN_ASYNC_STATE_DIR.description: Optional directory for task status JSON files. Defaults to ./state.

OBSIDIAN_ASYNC_MAX_FILE_SIZE.description: Maximum markdown file size to inspect, in bytes.

CALLBACK_BASE_URL.description: Optional VCP plugin callback base URL.

invocationCommands.description:
Queue a background Obsidian vault maintenance report.
Parameters:
- command: GenerateVaultReport
- taskName: optional display name.
Example:
<<<[TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
tool_name:「始」ObsidianAsyncWorker「末」
command:「始」GenerateVaultReport「末」
taskName:「始」Weekly vault report「末」
<<<[END_TOOL_REQUEST]>>>
